reviews.title: Not live up to its name
reviews.text: Been longing to stay at St Regis NYC but never get a chance to.  Was so delighted to find St Regis in Macau but was so disappointed.   (1) the room is smaller than it stated 50 sq. meters something, also the room deco is too dull and nothing special, not worth the room rate  (2)  The fridge is so stuffed that the guest can hardly find a little room to store his own f & b.  (3) There is a limit on the no. of clothes they iron for you, what if it's a couple with a kid, the guest will be charged on additional clothes ironed, never encountered this before.   (4) Room service only got Chinese food, all westerners have no choice  (5) The staff not so professional that they will still put your visa card transaction in the currency that you didn't opt for even you have checked the box of MOP, maybe it's because all the staff are mainland chinese whose performance are generally much lower than average.      I will NEVER ever stay in St Regis again, not the one in NYC nor the forthcoming one in Hong Kong

reviews.title: Disappointing  St. Regis we have been
reviews.text:
The price is relatively high compared to the nearby 5-star hotels - however, supporting facilities is not enough.

We were told the normal check-in time is 1500. When we arrived the hotel around 1435, the check-in staff told us to wait for an hour, as our room is not ready until 1530. She finally arranged another room for us, but saying “we arranged you to 37/F, but now, we can only give you 17/F” - Why making your customers feeling even worse?

Although they want to align the butler service with other St. Regis in the world, the service is slow and inefficient. When we ordered 2 cups of hot coffee, coffee already turned to room temperature when arrived.

reviews.text:
Located in the Lunderer area, it connects directly to famous hotels in Cotai like the Venetian. Especially, it is facing the City of Dreams (water show performance) and Wynn Palace (fountain show, gondola), making the movement distance short, which is great. Also, the MGM hotel and City of Dreams shuttle bus are convenient to use. 
The rooms are clean and soundproofing is perfect. The service is friendly, and extra blankets are provided for free. However, compared to other luxury hotels in the Cotai area (MGM, Venetian, Studio City, Hyatt), the rooms are relatively small.

reviews.title: Great overall choice with slight imperfections
reviews.text:
Chose st Regis because the price was quite reasonable for a luxurious brand. Wasn’t a disappointing stay at all, the staff are all extremely friendly and helpful. Location is great at the centre of the Cotai strip with walking distance to all the other attractions around here like Parisian and Wynn Palace. 

The room was spacious with good design. The toiletries provided was decent, not the greatest but decent. 
For the room the flaw is that it has a non negligible moldy smell. Travellers that are sensitive to such might want to take note.

Facilities was decent: gym was not bad, has adequate equipment for some basic strength/cardio. Only disappointment is that the main hotel pool was not heated, and only the small jacuzzi was. This could be one of the improvements made. 

Overall great stay and would rate it 9/10

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: This was my first time visiting the St. Regis Hotel in Macao, which is located right next to The Londoner Macao. We took the shuttle bus from the ferry terminal and strolled through the mall before arriving. The hotel has a stylish and exquisite design, and we received a warm welcome from the staff as soon as we arrived. Since the earliest check-in is at 3PM, we completed a simple pre-registration, dropped off our luggage, and then went out shopping. The hotel boasts top-notch butler service; when we returned, our luggage had been arranged to be placed in our room, along with coffee and fruit. Our room was on the 21st floor and was very spacious and comfortable, with a bright view overlooking the city. In addition to two large beds, there was a seating area and a workspace. The bathroom was also large, equipped with a shower and a bathtub, and all toiletries were provided. The shower pressure was excellent. We had a very pleasant evening. The hotel check-out is at 11AM, and the breakfast is delicious and very worthwhile, with a wide variety of options. It could even be called brunch—don’t miss it!

reviews.title: Great stay

reviews.title: Great choice for a weekend getaway
reviews.text:
I recently had the pleasure of staying at the St. Regis Macau, and I can't say enough good things about my experience. From the moment I checked in, the staff was incredibly helpful and welcoming, setting a positive tone for my stay.

Dining at The Manor was a highlight. The staff there was not only courteous but also genuinely attentive. The menu offered excellent choices, and every dish I tried was delicious and of high quality.

The room itself was immaculate, with top-notch amenities that enhanced my comfort. The service throughout my stay was superb, ensuring I had everything I needed at all times.

Overall, the environment was fantastic, and the customer service was truly exceptional. I would rate my experience a solid 6 stars! I highly recommend the St. Regis Macau to anyone looking for a luxurious getaway.

reviews.text: I’ve a pleasant stayed in St Regis Macao. The hotel location is just perfect as it is link to The Londoner Hotel. I would say it is convenient to access to Venetian and Parisian as well. Cleanliness is 10/10, the staff is helpful and kind enough to assist in every enquiries. reviews.title: High cost performance
reviews.text:
From the moment I got out of the taxi, I could feel the staff's friendly smiles and their initiative to engage in conversation. When I checked in at the lobby, I thanked the colleague who recommended the specialty café in Taipa. The room was very spacious and clean. There were four types of pillows for guests to choose from, which was very thoughtful.

The 38F St Regis Spa was excellent; the staff was friendly, the environment was comfortable, the room had a great view, and the therapist’s technique was commendable, leaving me completely relaxed. After the massage, I lay on the sofa watching the beautiful scenery while enjoying tea and snacks, which was absolutely worth it.

The next morning, I had breakfast at the 1F restaurant where the staff offered a welcome drink to my friend and me and even helped take and print photos for us. I will never forget her warm smile and greeting...

Even during check-out, I received thoughtful service.

An unforgettable accommodation experience.

A delightful birthday getaway.🧳

reviews.title: unforgettable birthday with St. Regis staff
reviews.text: It was my dad's birthday and the hotel staff celebrated him with a big surprise even TWICE even though we never mentioned it was his birthday! I sincerely appreciate the butlers named Eric, Prince, and Aris for bringing a delicious chocolate cake, a lovely teddy bear, and a special puzzle to surprise my dad. Their hospitality made his birthday the most memorable and we all were so touched. Also, we had a surprise celebration during breakfast by the restaurant staff. They brought us a special pancake and gave us a card with our picture on it. We never had such an amazing surprise before in other hotels. We couldn't be happier and we still feel very special remembering the experience. We thank St. Regis Macao for making our trip the most memorable. We'll come back in May bringing several business partners together and look forward to staying with you again.

reviews.title: An unforgettable stay — the team at St. Regis Macao, from the GM to every staff member, made us feel
reviews.positives: Everything about our stay at The St. Regis Macao was simply outstanding — a perfect 10 out of 10. The staff's attentiveness and genuine warmth set this hotel apart from any other. Special recognition goes to Cindy and Rod, who went above and beyond with their friendliness and care, making every interaction truly memorable. The entire team contributed to an exceptional experience — help was always at hand, requests were anticipated before even being made, and every smile felt sincere. A personal highlight was the chance to briefly meet General Manager Mr. Stuart-Wayne Douglas before our departure. It speaks volumes about the culture of this hotel that the GM himself takes the time to connect with guests personally — it's clear the exceptional service starts right at the top. The rooms were immaculate, beautifully appointed, and offered every comfort imaginable. The atmosphere strikes a perfect balance between grand luxury and genuine warmth.
reviews.negatives: Nothing at all. Every aspect of our stay exceeded expectations.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Absolutely amazing hotel! The location is super convenient — right in the heart of the Londoner complex. The room was luxurious, spacious, and thoughtfully designed, with everything you could possibly need. The bed was incredibly comfortable, and the housekeeping was outstanding — they even arranged my belongings beautifully every day, which was such a lovely touch.

The breakfast was absolutely delicious, with a wide variety of high-quality options and top-notch ingredients. The only downside was the wait time — I had to queue for about 15–20 minutes each morning.

Overall, I had a fantastic stay and would definitely return. Highly recommended!

reviews.title: Comfort yourself with Outstanding Butler Service
reviews.text: The Staff are attentive with remarkable service mind. The hotel is well-maintained and sparkling clean. Guests can enjoy 30% discount for Teamlab Macau! The 24-hr complimentary drinks are home-welcoming. Would recommend to stay here, compares to those 5-star hotels around, because of less crowded check in and do save you a lot of time. Come check-in early and leave everything to the reception, then go out to explore the city, come straight to pick up your key card once returned! Easy Breezy 😉

The bell, the front, the butler, the porter, the maid and everyone we encountered on the first day and throughout our 3 day stay was very hospitable until the last minute we were leaving the promises.  

The ambience,  the room, the amenities,  everything was beyond our expectations.  

We would like to thank St. Regis and the staff who took care of us and provided the freindly welcome to our stay in Macao. If we ever come back again we will definitely stay at St. Regis.

reviews.title: A truly pleasant and memorable stay with excellent service, great location, and outstanding breakfast.
reviews.positives:
My family and I received a warm welcome from all the hotel staff. Mr. David Leong was especially helpful and provided us with excellent recommendations on places to visit and how to get around.

The breakfast buffet was of very high quality with a great variety of options, and we also had the choice to order from the à la carte menu. One thing we truly appreciated was the late breakfast service, available until 1:00 PM.

The hotel is located in an outstanding location — right in the heart of Cotai — surrounded by top shopping and dining spots. We could easily walk to The Londoner, The Venetian, The Parisian, MGM Cotai, and Studio City.
reviews.negatives: There was nothing we didn’t like, but we would like to suggest that, given the high room rates, it would be a great addition to offer a Club Lounge for guests during happy hours, perhaps from 5 PM to 7 PM.

2. The trip was a celebration of my husband’s bday and the hotel gave us many touching surprises in their service, which made this trip very memorable.

This was our first time at a St Regis, but we'll definitely pick it over others on future travels!

reviews.title: Great for couple with young children
reviews.text:
We (a couple with a toddler and an infant) stayed for 3 nights and really impressed with the our stay. For the money you pay, this should be the gold standard of a 5 stars hotel hospitality. The staffs from all the level (receptionist, butler, housekeeper, room service staff, swimming pool and spa staff) were really professional and helpful. I celebrated wedding anniversary with my wife in our room and I got a little help from the butler team to prepare surprise for my wife. It was memorable!  
Our booking come with complimentary breakfast buffet. The food was very good with wide range of choice, picky eater will have no problem eating here. Not to mention the location is very nearby to shopping area and kid play area. 
If you are bringing young children to Macao to rest, do a little bit of shopping and to enjoy time with family, I’d strongly recommend St. Regis Cotai Macao!

My and my friends enjoyed the spa and afternoon tea package and certainly will return again .  
We also loved the 6 pm champagne party at the lobby with free bubblies for guests ... 

PS special thanks to Ricky and his team !

All of the staffs are super helpful and friendly! You will get their attentions right the way when you need help without even asking. The buffet breakfast is excellent as well!

I was truly satisfied with everything and would love to visit again next time!!

reviews.title: Lights, Luxury and Love at The St. Regis Macao
reviews.text:
Our stay at The St. Regis Macao was nothing short of extraordinary. From the moment we arrived, we were treated with warmth and genuine hospitality but what truly made our visit unforgettable was the incredible surprise upgrade to a Presidential Suite for our honeymoon. It was beyond anything we could have imagined.

To make the celebration even more special, the team prepared a beautiful surprise cake and balloons for us, a thoughtful gesture that meant so much. We were gifted with an elegant afternoon tea too from their General Manager. It was an experience that felt both intimate and truly luxurious.

The 24/7 butler service was impeccable. Every request was handled with efficiency, care, and a level of attentiveness that elevated our entire stay. It’s rare to encounter service this refined and consistent.

The suite itself was immaculate—spotlessly clean, beautifully designed, and incredibly spacious. And while the view is impressive any time of day, the Eiffel Tower truly comes alive at night - illuminated in dazzling lights, creating a magical, almost cinematic backdrop that made our evening unforgettable.

Every detail was perfectly executed, making this one of the most memorable hotel experiences we’ve ever had. We left feeling celebrated, relaxed, and already dreaming of our return.

To Cecille, Jeffrey, the Butler Team and their GM (sorry I forgot his name), thank you soooo much! ❤️

reviews.title: A Remarkable Stay at St. Regis Macau: Truly Astonishing!
reviews.positives:
I recently had the pleasure of staying at the St. Regis Hotel in Macau, and I must say it was an experience beyond compare. From the moment I stepped foot in the hotel, I was captivated by its grandeur and elegance. Every aspect of my stay, from the stunning decor to the impeccable service, exceeded my expectations and left a lasting impression.

The hotel itself is nothing short of astonishing. The architecture and design are a perfect blend of modern luxury and timeless charm. The attention to detail in every corner of the hotel was remarkable, and it truly made me feel like I was in a world of unparalleled beauty.
However, what truly sets St. Regis Macau apart is its exceptional staff. The personnel went above and beyond to ensure that every single request I had was met with utmost professionalism and care. David, Tracy, Jim, and Leo deserve a special mention for their outstanding service. Their attentiveness, warm demeanor, and dedication to their work truly made my stay unforgettable. They anticipated my needs, offered helpful suggestions, and made me feel like a valued guest throughout my entire stay. Their genuine passion for hospitality shone through, and I am immensely grateful for their contributions to making my experience exceptional.
The rooms at St. Regis Macau were luxurious havens of comfort. Elegantly designed and meticulously maintained, my accommodation provided a serene retreat after a long day of exploring the vibrant city. The amenities provided were of the highest quality, and every detail, from the bedding to the state-of-the-art technology, was carefully curated to ensure a blissful stay.
In conclusion, my experience at St. Regis Macau was nothing short of exceptional. The sheer beauty of the place, combined with the professionalism and attentiveness of the staff, made it a truly remarkable stay.

reviews.title: Overall Review
reviews.text:
Space and Comfort: Rooms are spacious, clean, and quiet, with comfortable mattresses, high-quality bedding, and effective sound insulation. Amenities include double basins, bathtubs, refrigerators, free Wi-Fi, and branded toiletries.

• Views: Some rooms offer views of the Cotai Strip, with sights like the Eiffel Tower and Big Ben visible, adding to the appeal.

• Family-Friendly Features: The hotel provides thoughtful amenities for children, such as baby cribs, bottle sterilizers, and strollers.

Staff

• Butler Service: It is the only hotel in Macau to offer 24-hour signature butler service to all guests, which can customize stays according to needs.

• Professionalism and Friendliness: From the front desk, concierge, to restaurant and gym staff, all are well-trained, enthusiastic, and attentive. They can provide personalized travel advice, assist with transportation arrangements.

reviews.title: An Outstanding Hotel I Highly Recommend
reviews.text:
I had a wonderful stay at The St. Regis Macao, and it truly exceeded my expectations from start to finish.

I would especially like to commend Hazel, the Korean staff member who assisted me during check-in. On the day of my arrival, I was personally going through a difficult moment and felt mentally overwhelmed. Hazel’s calm, warm, and thoughtful manner made a meaningful difference and immediately helped me feel at ease. She explained everything clearly, anticipated my needs, and handled the entire process with genuine care rather than scripted politeness. Because of her, my stay began on a very positive and comforting note.

Unfortunately, I was not able to see Hazel again at check-out, which I found genuinely disappointing. If this review is shared internally, I truly hope that my positive feedback about Hazel is passed along to her and the management team. If this message reaches her directly, I would like to sincerely thank her once again for her kindness and professionalism, and I hope to have the opportunity to meet her again on my next visit to Macao.

The room was spotless and beautifully maintained, and the butler service was thoughtful, discreet, and attentive, exactly as expected from the St. Regis brand. Breakfast and all other facilities were excellent and consistently well managed.

The location is another major highlight. Macao Tower is easily accessible via the MGM shuttle, while Senado Square can be reached using the City of Dreams shuttle—both within about five minutes. The hotel is also directly connected to The Venetian and The Parisian, making shopping and getting around extremely convenient.

Most importantly, every staff member I encountered throughout my stay was courteous, professional, and genuinely kind. This is not a sponsored review—this was a fully paid stay. Whenever I return to Macao, I will definitely choose The St. Regis Macao again. I’ve just arrived back in Korea, and already I find myself wanting to return to Macao, which says everything about how memorable this stay was.

reviews.title: Amazing Stay, Great Staff
reviews.text:
The rooms itself was a bit dated, but the amenities were great. Location was great for accessing the casino and the malls, but if you're taking the shuttle buses it is a bit of a walk (indoors) to the hotel.

Service is great overall! For some reason the staff at check-in did not arrange for a bell boy to carry our luggage up to our room , it was a weekday so I don't think there should be a shortage of staff. Otherwise the breakfast buffet was amazing, the service there is impeccable. Check-out was great, staff are helpful, Mario at the concierge was really warm and helped us with storing and carrying our luggage.

As we mentioned earlier, the walk from the hotel to the shuttle buses was a bit far and we were really dreading that journey. Thankfully Jeffrey was kind enough to carry our luggage and walked us all the way to the shuttle buses. We really enjoyed the conversation with Jeffrey, and his help made the journey less confusing and arduous. 

Overall we really enjoyed our stay at St. Regis Macao, they did live up to our expectations and we would not hesitate to come back again.

reviews.title: True leader of hospitality
reviews.text:
I had a really wonderful stay at St Regis Macao! I went there with my hubby to celebrate our anniversary. Due to the tight schedule, we stayed for one night only. We also went Manor for lunch and joined the Bloody Mary making class on the check out day. Everything is just perfect and the experience is truly highly recommended, esp the bloody mary making class, which is so much fun!
 
Special thanks to the whole St Regis team, especially the below.
Rooms – Gigi who checked us in (she was so sweet and informative, and sent us a pair of bears, I especially love the cards)
Rooms – Alex the butler, John from Housekeeping, the concierge staff who brought me the bear for exchange (my bad that I misunderstood the bears were both male, thank you for his trip)
 
Manor – Cindy and Kayer (not sure if I have the name right, the hostesses, made us feel so welcomed though we arrived early); Rod (who took care of our table, and basically the whole part of floor, he did so well! Amazed with his service and time management!) and Fancy (we had such a great time at Manor and were running late to the bloody mary making class, I asked her to call St Regis Bar that we would be late. She personally made the trip to the Bar and made sure things were prepared. Truly appreciated!)
 
St Regis Bar – Alvin who greeted us at the Bar (again very welcoming); Nick, the bartender who went through the Bar info, history and the class with us. (He knows everything so well and it was so fun to have the class! Love and admire his passion and attitude!) Thank you not just Alvin and Nick, but also Eric and Fiona who prepared us the anniversary surprise as a team. Absolutely fascinating!

reviews.title: Thank you to the wonderful staff.
reviews.text:
Since we only stayed one night in Macau via Hong Kong, we were unsure about which hotel to choose, but it was undoubtedly the right choice. The hardware was wonderful, but the hospitality displayed by the staff—at the front desk, restaurant, bar, and room service—was overflowing. They went above and beyond to ensure we could create enjoyable memories. Thank you very much.

Knowing that it was our anniversary trip, we received a wonderfully delicious chocolate cake, charming balloon decorations, and a card in our check-in room. 
Room: The view of the Eiffel Tower and the pool was beautiful both day and night, filling us with excitement about coming to Macau. The bed was comfortably sized and remained clean and fresh despite the area's high humidity. The double sink and the bathroom were very convenient to use, and the closet was adequately spacious for three people.
Dining: The ceremony of opening champagne with a sword was amusing, and the carefully selected ingredients in the bar and breakfast venue were beautifully cooked, making for a visually enjoyable dining experience. Lunch was incredibly voluminous, and after having cake and spending time at the bar, we were too full to have dinner, but the in-room dining menu looked deliciously ample, and I would like to try it next time.
Pool and Gym: The pool area was comfortably furnished with cabanas and deck chairs, and we felt completely refreshed after spending about an hour there. They offered juice and water, allowing us to enjoy a resort atmosphere. The gym was open 24 hours, and I jogged while enjoying a beautiful night view.
As we strolled around appreciating the night scenery, the day passed quickly, and it was a hotel that made me feel like I definitely wanted to visit again for a longer stay next time.

reviews.title: Among all my trips to Macau, which are always filled with excitement, this has been the most exceptional place I’ve stayed.
reviews.text:
When I first visited Macau with my parents last February, we stayed at the Four Seasons and were truly impressed by the service. That experience brought me back just four months later—this time to The St. Regis.

I had pretty high expectations going in and was a bit worried I might be let down, but everything exceeded what I hoped for. From start to finish, the stay was seamless and comfortable.

A special thank-you to George, the Front Office Manager, whose calm and welcoming presence made a real difference. His warm hospitality became one of the highlights of the trip.

Thanks to him, both my friend and I now think of Macau with nothing but good memories—and a great reason to come back.

Thank you!

reviews.title: Spacious, high-quality, comfortable accommodation.
reviews.text:
The hotel is of high standard, with guests generally belonging to the quality middle class, quiet and polite. Check-in arrangements are flexible; early check-in is possible, and after 3:00 PM, you can directly pick up your key and enter your room. Therefore, during peak hours, there is no need to queue. The check-in counter and seating area are comfortable, offering welcome drinks while handling the check-in process. The front desk staff is warm and friendly, especially Felix Butlet, whose English accent is impeccable and has a British gentlemanly charm.

The large double bed suite is located at the end of the hallway, with an excellent view that showcases three iconic buildings. The room's configuration and amenities are of high quality, making it hard to want to go out. In the evening, there is a female housekeeper who cleans the bathroom and tea set and replenishes the beverage supplies. She even personally delivers high-end fragrance that promotes restful sleep, showing such kindness, warmth, and thoughtfulness. Additionally, thank you to Eric for specially sending a pot of jasmine hot tea, teacups, and cookies as snacks. The bedding is comfortable, making it easy to drift into sleep.

Although the pool and massage pool are average, they still satisfy the desire for a bit of swimming.

The hotel has a famous bar, where a jazz singer performs after 8:30 PM, showcasing extraordinary talent. Although lacking a drummer, the pianist can produce string and piano effects using both an electronic keyboard and an acoustic piano, which is truly impressive. The cocktails are unique and offer great value for money, definitely worth a try.

I will consider staying here again next time. 🥰

reviews.title: A perfect place to celebrate life’s special moments.
reviews.text:
We recently stayed at The St. Regis Macao to celebrate my mom’s birthday, and the experience was absolutely unforgettable. From the moment we arrived, the staff made us feel incredibly welcome and treated us with the kind of warmth and care that made our stay truly special.

The hotel itself is stunning—elegant, luxurious, and immaculately maintained. Our room was upgraded to a room that offered a breathtaking view of the Cotai Strip and was both spacious and beautifully decorated.

What made the experience even more memorable was the attention to detail. The signature St. Regis butler service exceeded all expectations, thanks to an unexpected birthday surprise when we entered the room. Sir Prince and Sir Rio even brought us a scrumptious cake that made mom’s heart swell with joy!

The breakfast at The Manor was a highlight. The food was exquisite—fresh, refined, and bursting with flavor.

From Sir Kenny, Sir Prince, Ma’am Meko, Sir Rio, Sir Arnold, every team member we encountered—from the front desk to the concierge—went out of their way to make our stay comfortable and joyful. My mom was genuinely touched by how thoughtful and seamless everything was.

This wasn’t just a luxurious getaway—it was a heartfelt celebration made even more beautiful by the kindness and professionalism of the St. Regis team. We left with full hearts and lasting memories.

reviews.title: Absolutely Exceptional Stay
reviews.text:
This is my second time staying with St. Regis Macao. It was amazing the first time and even better the second time around. On my initial trip, I was on my own, and had such a great experience that this time, I brought my family, and we all loved it.

The rooms were spacious, bright, and impeccably clean. With a big family, they were able to accommodate us in adjoining rooms. The outdoor pool was a highlight, and the poolside lunch was absolutely delicious. 

What truly set this hotel apart was the incredible hospitality. Every member of the staff went above and beyond. They made my children feel so welcomed with their kindness and thoughtful gifts, which made our stay unforgettable.

After my time with them, I have certainly become a loyal customer, and I can't wait to return. I highly recommend this hotel for anyone looking for a fantastic experience!

reviews.title: Eleganza senza tempo e servizio impeccabile al St. Regis Macao
reviews.positives:
The St. Regis Macao è semplicemente bellissimo.
Hotel curato in ogni dettaglio, con un’eleganza raffinata che si percepisce appena entri.

La stanza è top: ampia, silenziosa, letto comodissimo e finiture di altissimo livello.
La colazione è super, ricca, di qualità eccellente e con un servizio sempre attento e puntuale.

Un plauso speciale va al servizio maggiordomo, davvero impeccabile: presente ma mai invadente, estremamente gentile e premuroso. La sera ci ha fatto trovare anche due pastéis de nata come buonanotte, un gesto semplice ma che fa la differenza e ti fa sentire davvero coccolato.

Un soggiorno che unisce lusso, comfort e attenzione autentica per l’ospite.
Un hotel che lascia il segno e che sceglierei di nuovo senza esitazioni.
reviews.negatives: Sia sul piano che all’interno della stanza c’era uno strano odore, simile a fumo “vecchio”, non come se qualcuno avesse fumato in quel momento, ma più come un odore impregnato nella moquette o nell’aria, che purtroppo è rimasto per tutta la durata del soggiorno.

reviews.title: Excellent experience.
reviews.text:
My experience at the St. Regis Hotel in Macau exceeded my expectations! The hotel's design is luxurious and elegant, with every detail exuding opulence, as if stepping into a dreamlike world. The room is spacious and comfortable, equipped with modern amenities, and the oversized bathroom made me feel right at home.

What impressed me the most was the hotel's service. The staff were warm and attentive, always wearing a smile and ready to meet guests' needs. The concierge service during check-in was very professional, making us feel exceptionally welcomed.

The dining options at the hotel were also satisfying. In particular, the food offered by the hotel's restaurant, whether for breakfast or dinner, was exquisite and delicious, fully reflecting Macau's culinary culture. Moreover, the bar's elegant environment is perfect for relaxation and socializing.

Finally, the hotel's location is a significant highlight, making it convenient to reach major attractions in Macau, which is ideal for travelers. Whether for business or leisure, the St. Regis Hotel is undoubtedly an ideal choice. I will definitely return and recommend it to my friends!

reviews.title: Excelente opção para Macau
reviews.positives: O pessoal neste hotel é simplesmente incrível, em especial na recepção e consiergerie, dos melhores que já vi. A atenção e profissionalismo do Luke foi excecional. Se ficar neste hotel, não deixe de conhecê-lo. Organizou tickets, transfers personalizados e exigentes com muito profissionalismo. Many thanks, Luke !!! O serviço de pequeno almoço é acima da média, para a Ásia, atendendo muito bem os gostos ocidentais, com ótimo café, boa variedade de pães e pastelaria e ainda, variedade de queijos e presuntos. A localização do hotel é primorosa, com acesso a tudo em Macau. Conhecer o diretor de recepção que fala português, David, foi fantástico. O acesso direto ao centro comercial é muito bom.
reviews.negatives: O duche com pouca pressão foi mesmo frustrante neste hotel, tirando conforto da estadia. A piscina na sombra também não motivou lá estar. O engenheiro deste edifício devia ser processado.

reviews.title: The best service hotel in Macao
reviews.text:
As soon as we arrived at the hotel, the staff warmly welcomed us and efficiently handled our check-in. They even gave us a tour of the hotel before personally escorting us to our room, where we were greeted with drinks, egg tarts, and fresh fruit. If we wanted more, we could simply ask the butler to bring extra. Everything was unlimited and complimentary.  

Seeing that I had two young children, the hotel thoughtfully provided a variety of toys and toiletries for them. They also shared plenty of helpful tips on exploring Macau, making our trip even smoother.  

The room was spotless and offered a fantastic view of The Londoner and The Parisian, especially at night when the city lights created a breathtaking scene.  

Overall, it was an amazing experience, and we’ll definitely be coming back!
